title: senecio albus
intro: Senecio albus, also known as Groundsel, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family, with a history of traditional use in folk medicine. The plant's medicinal properties lie in its ability to induce sweating, relieve respiratory issues, and act as a purgative. The health benefits of Groundsel include its potential to treat conditions such as bronchitis, coughs, and skin problems, as well as its ability to aid in the removal of toxins from the body. Groundsel is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are typically used externally to treat skin conditions or internally to address respiratory issues.
